header.name: Sijoy Almeida
header.tagline: Software Engineer · MS Information Systems · Full-Stack Builder

bullets: Architected full IT infrastructure (LAN/WAN, CCTV, POS, CRM) for 50+ SMBs across Boston & Maine, achieving 99.9% uptime
Designed CRM automation with WhatsApp API processing 1,000+ leads/month — client scaled from 3 to 27 employees on infrastructure built solo
Built 5-agent autonomous overnight operations system (Node.js, Claude Code, SMTP/IMAP, GitHub Actions) — 13 SOPs, 35 email templates, automated pipeline
Developed AI-powered property recommendation engine using RAG pipeline (Llama 3 + ChromaDB) achieving 95% accuracy on 50K+ datasets, latency reduced 8s→4s
Created gesture-controlled MIDI engine using OpenCV + MediaPipe — 21 hand landmarks tracked at 60 FPS, sub-15ms latency to MIDI output

bullets: Computer vision tracks 21 hand landmarks at 60 FPS, Euclidean distance maps to MIDI velocity for expressive musical control
